positive: A distressed, retro mascot design of a friendly bear wearing a bandana and holding a picnic basket. The style should mimic vintage screen-printed artwork from the 1950s, using a limited, earthy color palette (mustard yellow, teal, burnt orange). Simple linework, sticker art, high contrast, clean vector style.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealism, gradient shading, modern fonts
